emails.subject: Dan
emails.body: Hi Suz, Does Dan know about Julia changing groups? I wasn't going to mention it, but I was wondering if he had heard about it yet. Hard times. I hope he is having a fantastic time. Kay Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: Dan
emails.body: RE: Dan She is taking over Global Finance Legal. I heard Peter and Travis will be working with her. I asked what Dan will be doing, but the person I talked to didn't know. I think this just happened Friday. I don't know what I will be doing. I suspect someone will be doing the power stuff. I do wish I knew. I am afraid Dan would worry if he knew about Julia unless she has left him a message. If I hear anything I will let you know. Did you hear Alice quit? Couldn't risk the uncertainty. I'm looking forward to the long weekend! Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: Dan
emails.body: RE: Dan Jordan is taking Christina Mordant's last job, Corp Development. Dan is convinced that he (Dan) will be laid off, and I'm worn out trying to talk him out of the feeling. Is Carol going back to Swaps? I'm taking Wednesday off. It will be very quiet all week. I may take the opportunity to run some errands. See you later, Kay Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: Dan
emails.body: Dan hasn't expressed that he feels like he'll be laid off to me. You know, who knows what will happen. I feel like whatever is meant to be will happen. I don't know what Carol will be doing, she's just homebasing out of 38. I'll be here this week, but like you, I feel like it'll be very quiet, so maybe I can get some things done too. I have Christmas cards to do! We took family pictures yesterday. My brother and family were in their Salvation Army uniforms. Please keep me informed if you hear anything, and I will do the same. To: Adams, Suzanne
